Uses of Interface
gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.repository.RepositoryFactory

Packages that use RepositoryFactory
Package
Description
gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb
The dynamodb package contains packages and classes supporting integration of IZ Gateway Hub with DynamoDB as it's back end database.
gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.service
 
gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.service.accesscontrol
This package contains classes and interfaces related to access control services within the IZ Gateway Hub application.

  • Uses of RepositoryFactory in gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb

    Classes in gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb that implement RepositoryFactory
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DynamoDbRepositoryFactory
    Creates the necessary Beans for DynamoDB repository access These are the clients that are used to access any DynamoDB repositories
